panels.title: Mesh Backhaul SNR (apclix0, 5 GHz) — UNRELIABLE
panels.description: WARNING: The MediaTek MT7915 driver in the EAP610 reports a hardcoded noise floor (~-57 dBm across all bands/interfaces) instead of measuring it. SNR = signal - noise becomes a near-constant transform of signal alone. Cross-check: the mesh negotiates >1 Gbps bitrate, which is incompatible with a real 2-4 dB SNR. Use this panel only to detect changes in signal strength, not absolute SNR health. Real indicators of mesh problems live in 'Radio TX Fail Rate' and 'Per-VAP Retry Discard Deltas' below.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and r.iface == "apclix0" and r._field == "snr")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and r.iface == "apclix0" and r._field == "signal_dbm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and r.iface == "apclix0" and r._field == "noise_dbm")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and r.iface == "apclix0" and r._field == "bitrate_mbps")
  |> last()

panels.title: Mesh SNR Over Time
panels.description: Mesh backhaul SNR per EAP host. Drops below 15 dB correlate strongly with video-call cuts in mesh deployments.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and r._field == "snr")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "iface"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_mesh" and (r._field == "signal_dbm" or r._field == "noise_dbm"))
  |> group(columns: ["host", "iface", "_field"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Radio TX Packet Error Rate
panels.description: Cumulative since boot. High Tx PER (>5%) on the 2.4G radio is normal under load; a sudden delta jump indicates instantaneous failure. Use the rate panel below for live signal.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_radio" and r._field == "tx_per_pct")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "band"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Radio TX Fail Rate (deltas)
panels.description: Per-second growth of `tx_fail` counter — the live failure signal. Spikes here mean retransmits are happening NOW, unlike the cumulative PER above.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_radio" and r._field == "tx_fail")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "band"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_radio" and r._field == "temp_c")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "band"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Last TX MCS Index
panels.description: Higher = more efficient modulation. Falls under bad RF conditions (interference, distance, retries).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_radio" and r._field == "last_tx_mcs")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "band"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)

panels.title: Per-VAP Retry Discard Deltas
panels.description: Per-second growth of /proc/net/wireless retry counters per VAP (Virtual AP / SSID). Use to see which SSID is experiencing the most retries.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_vap" and r._field == "disc_retry")
  |> group(columns: ["host", "iface"])
  |> derivative(unit: 1s, nonNegative: true)
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "netmon")
  |> range(start: -5m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "eap_radio" and (r._field == "temp_c" or r._field == "tx_per_pct" or r._field == "rx_per_pct" or r._field == "last_tx_mcs"))
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["host", "band", "iface"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> keep(columns: ["host", "band", "iface", "temp_c", "tx_per_pct", "rx_per_pct", "last_tx_mcs"])
